title: Original Einhell 4-pcs. SDS Plus Chisel Set, 250 mm (Pointed, 20 mm Flat, 40 mm Spade, 50 mm Tile Chisel made of Durable 40Cr Steel for Demolition and Renovation Work)
features: All-in-one solution - The 4-piece chisel set includes the most important chisel shapes for demolition and renovation work: a pointed chisel, flat chisel, spade chisel and tile chisel.
Pointed chisel - The pointed chisel made of 40Cr steel with a length of 250 mm is ideal for demolition and demolition work and impresses with its very good service life.
Flat chisel - Thanks to a width of 20 mm, the 250 mm long flat chisel offers a high material removal rate and is suitable for renovations and remodelling.
Spade chisel - With its wide cutting edge of 40 mm, the 250 mm long spade chisel made of 40 Cr steel ensures a high removal rate and rapid progress in masonry and mortar.
Tile chisel - The 50 mm wide, offset SDS Plus tile chisel made from 40Cr steel is ideal for easy gripping and clean removal of wall and floor tiles.

SDS Plus receptacle - The stone chisels are compatible with standard SDS Plus hammer drills and are suitable for sand-lime brick, aerated concrete, hollow block, masonry, concrete, wall and floor tiles.
Practical plastic tube - The demolition tools are stored in a robust twist tube with adjustable length threaded lock, hexagonal end and Euro hole hanger.
description: Product Description EINHELL SET 4-Piece SDS Plus Chisel Set, 250 mm The 4-piece SDS Plus chisel set with a length of 250 mm is an all-in-one solution designed for a range of demolition and renovation work. It includes the most important chisel shapes for different tasks: a pointed chisel, flat chisel, spade chisel and tile chisel. Efficient and Powerful For DIY and Sanitary Applications The chisel set is particularly suitable for hard materials such as concrete, masonry, wall and floor tiles, sand-lime brick, aerated concrete and hollow block . This makes it ideal for use in DIY and sanitary applications as well as for renovating bathrooms or demolition work where efficiency is required. Previous page Pointed Chisel The 250 mm long pointed chisel is ideal for demolition work . Made from high-quality 40 Cr steel, it impresses with a very long service life . Flat Chisel Thanks to a width of 20 mm, the 250 mm long flat chisel made from high-quality 40 Cr steel offers a high material removal rate for renovations and remodelling. Spade Chisel With its wide cutting edge of 40 mm, the 250 mm spade chisel made of 40 Cr steel ensures a high removal rate in masonry and mortar . It is characterised by efficient progress . Tile Chisel The 50 mm wide, offset SDS Plus tile chisel made from 40Cr steel is ideal for easy gripping and quick and clean removal of wall and floor tiles. Next page Practical Twist Tube Threaded Fastener The chisels are stored in a robust, resealable plastic tube with a threaded fastener that is infinitely adjustable in length. Hexagonal End The twist tube has a hexagonal end that prevents the twist tube from rolling away. Euro Hole Hanger Thanks to the Euro hole hanger, the twist tube with the chisel set can be optimally hung in the workshop or garage. Transparent tube The moisture- and oil-resistant twist tube is transparent for easily recognisable contents at a glance. Brand-Independent Compatible with Standard SDS Plus Rotary Hammers The four chisels have a universal SDS Plus receptacle and are compatible with all commercially available SDS Plus rotary hammers for maximum flexibility. Thanks to the SDS Plus receptacle, the chisels can be changed quickly without additional tools.
